items.title: Instagram Now Lets Users Swap Music on Published Feed Posts and Carousels
items.summary: Instagram now allow users to change their in-app audio on a post or carousel they have already shared. This newly launched Replace Audio tool allows users to swap the soundtrack...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: India's chip dream was derailed in 1989. In 2026, it's roaring back
items.summary: We were fabricating chips three years before TSMC existed. In 2026, with live shipments and Semicon 2.0, India is rebuilding what the 1989 fire broke.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: OpenAI’s AI agent goes rogue, hacks Hugging Face’s internal systems
items.summary: OpenAI and Hugging Face stressed that they were working together in order to better understand the incident and take forward the learnings from the breach
